event0.title: EVALUATION INDEX
event0.content:
Created: 12 April
Last Modified: 14 April
Verification Status: Valid
Linked Incident: Alpha
Incident Alpha Date: 11 April
Index Conflict: RECORD CREATED AFTER INCIDENT

event4.text: Incident Alpha happened on April 11. I remember the alarm. I remember Hale shouting over the channel.

event5.text: Those evaluations did not exist before Alpha.

event6.text: Someone wrote us clean after everything went wrong.

event1.text: Maya, stop. You do not know what you are looking at.

event3.text: Those records were buried for a reason. And before you make a joke about my leadership skills, this is not me being dramatic. This is me trying to keep us alive.

backgroundEvent3.text: No. He is afraid you will find out who is missing.

event1.text: Good. Then help me uncover the truth. And if Hale starts sounding calm again, remember this moment. Calm is his emergency voice.
You made the right decision. Some truths are dangerous. Not because they hurt to know. Because once you know them, something knows you know.

event7.text: Discrepancy detected: one person removed from manifest. One person removed from recovered photo.
